name: Burrito Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred shredded cheddar cheese.
2. Brown the meat in oil and drain excess fat.
3. Add remaining ingredients except cheese.
4. Simmer over low heat for 2 to 3 hours.
5. Once cooked, shred the meat with a fork and drain any excess liquid.
6. Serve on tortillas topped with shredded cheddar cheese.
